params._admin: Backend admin wallet address authorised to execute critical functions
params._cUSD: ERC-20 cUSD token address on Celo

params.creator: Wallet address of the tournament creator / jury
params.eventId: Unique event identifier (keccak256 of off-chain UUID)
The event whose prize pool to distribute
params.shares: Corresponding cUSD amounts each winner receives

returns.creator: Tournament creator address
returns.distributed: Whether the prize has been distributed / refunded

createEvent(bytes32,uint256,address).notice: Create a new tournament event on-chain (admin-only).

distributePrize(bytes32,address[],uint25.notice: Distribute the prize pool to winners (admin-only).         Sum of `shares` must equal the total `prizePool`.

emergencyRefund(bytes32).notice: Refund every participant their ticket price (admin-only).         Can only be called before prize distribution.

getEventInfo(bytes32).notice: Query event info (pool, distribution status, participant count).

isParticipant(bytes32,address).notice: Check whether an address is registered for an event.

register(bytes32).notice: Register for a tournament by depositing the exact ticket price in cUSD.         Caller must have approved this contract for at least `ticketPrice` cUSD beforehand.
